system: AREAL-NEVA CORE ORCHESTRA; MVP; server-first; Telegram interface; OpenRouter LLM; SQLite memory; simplified stack without tg_agent/storage_layer/orchestra.db
architecture: Telegram -> telegram_daemon.py -> core.db(tasks) -> task_worker.py -> core/ai_router.py -> OpenRouter API -> memory_api_server.py(memory.db) -> Telegram
pipeline: message intake -> INSERT task(state='NEW') -> SELECT NEW ORDER BY created_at -> UPDATE 'IN_PROGRESS' -> process_ai_task -> OpenRouter call -> response -> send_reply -> UPDATE DONE/FAILED -> memory write/read
memory: path=/root/.areal-neva-core/data/memory.db; table=memory(id,chat_id,key,value,timestamp); write=POST /memory and save_memory(user_input,assistant_output); read=GET /memory?chat_id=...; injection=partial via ai_router context
integrations: telegram=aiogram polling; openrouter=HTTP POST https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions; memory_api=Flask 127.0.0.1:8091; google_drive=NOT_IMPLEMENTED
logic: states=NEW,IN_PROGRESS,DONE,FAILED; worker loop select->update->process->reply->update; reply uses reply_to_message_id; memory saved on input/output
decisions: remove tg_agent/storage_layer/orchestra.db; use direct Telegram daemon + core.db; OpenRouter as single LLM; memory via memory_api_server; snapshot baseline fixed; emergency memory write via SQLite
solutions: sql_quotes_fix; state_machine_simplify; env_load_fix; ai_router_ru_prompt; memory_write_patch; cleanup_old_files; pycache_cleanup; pkill_split_fix
code: SELECT id,chat_id,raw_input,reply_to_message_id FROM tasks WHERE state='NEW' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1; UPDATE tasks SET state='IN_PROGRESS' WHERE id=?; result=resp['choices'][0]['message']['content']; POST /memory JSON(chat_id,key,value)
errors: no such column NEW → use state='NEW'
no such column IN_PROGRESS → use state='IN_PROGRESS'
invalid transition NEW->NEW → remove duplicate transition
invalid transition IN_PROGRESS->IN_PROGRESS → simplify state flow
no LLM API key → load env
route_task missing args → remove old router
limits: no Google Drive; no file pipeline; no OCR/STT; no document/estimate/DWG engines; memory context limited; no confirmation/archived states
pending: drive integration; file pipeline; OCR; document_engine; estimate_engine; DWG; full memory context; confirmation lifecycle
